file_insights.purpose: Tracks progress of dogfood subtasks with full spec_content, verification commands, and timestamped completion notes
file_insights.structure: JSON array of subtask objects containing: id, description, command, expected, status, spec_content, notes, updated_at
file_insights.key_observation: Single source of truth for subtask status and specifications; uses ISO 8601 timestamps with microsecond precision

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent process: bop new implement <id> --team <team> → populate spec.md → verify with bop list + jq filter → commit
patterns_discovered.evidence: All 5 newly created cards (bop-serve, bop-doctor-checks, e2e-factory-test, adapter-stress-test, model-routing) follow identical structure
model-routing card lives in .cards/team-intelligence/pending/ while earlier cards in .cards/pending/ are team-cli/team-quality

patterns_discovered.description: Unicode playing card glyphs identify team ownership: 🂢 (team-cli), 🃁 (team-quality), 🃓 (team-intelligence)
patterns_discovered.evidence: Each card includes glyph prefix in directory name matching team assignment

patterns_discovered.description: Cards verified post-creation using: bop list --state pending --json | jq -r '.[] | select(.id == "<id>") | .id'
patterns_discovered.evidence: All 5 subtasks include identical verification command pattern in implementation_plan.json

patterns_discovered.description: Multiple subtasks (1-4 through 1-7) marked completed in single session with sequential timestamp updates
patterns_discovered.evidence: implementation_plan.json shows status progression with timestamps spanning 23:23:45 to 23:40:00

gotchas_discovered.description: Early subtasks created in flat .cards/pending/ but team-intelligence cards require .cards/team-intelligence/pending/ nesting
gotchas_discovered.impact: Directory path changes midway; requires awareness of team-specific routing

gotchas_discovered.description: Each team requires specific playing card glyph; 🃓 (club) for team-intelligence not interchangeable with 🂢 (spade) or 🃁 (diamond)
gotchas_discovered.impact: Glyph selection must match team assignment or card may be indexed incorrectly

gotchas_discovered.description: Timestamps sometimes include full microseconds (23:25:09.020525) and sometimes round to zeros (23:40:00.000000)
gotchas_discovered.impact: Last_updated field precision varies; may indicate automated vs manual timestamp generation

gotchas_discovered.description: Verification relies on exact jq filtering; if card ID doesn't match or bop list output changes format, verification fails silently
gotchas_discovered.impact: False positives possible if card exists but filtering is incorrect

completion_details.specification_coverage: Complete cost-based model routing spec with cheap/capable/premium tiers mapping to haiku/sonnet/opus models
completion_details.verification_result: Card properly indexed with id "model-routing" confirmed via bop list
completion_details.git_commit: auto-claude: subtask-1-7 - Create model-routing card for team-intelligence

recommendations.recommendation: Create mapping table of SMP glyphs to teams (🂢=team-cli, 🃁=team-quality, 🃓=team-intelligence, etc.)
recommendations.rationale: Glyphs are non-obvious; explicit mapping reduces errors in team-specific card creation

recommendations.recommendation: Templatize card creation since all 5 subtasks follow identical: bop new → populate spec → verify → commit pattern
recommendations.rationale: Repeated structure suggests automation opportunity; could reduce manual steps and typo surface area

recommendations.recommendation: Define JSON schema for implementation_plan.json to enforce: id uniqueness, required fields (spec_content, notes, status), timestamp format
recommendations.rationale: File is growing as tracking mechanism; schema prevents structural drift across future subtasks

recommendations.recommendation: Add fallback verification: if jq filtering returns empty, retry bop list with --debug to diagnose indexing issues
recommendations.rationale: Current verification provides yes/no signal but no diagnostics if card creation partially succeeds

recommendations.recommendation: Standardize timestamp generation: either always preserve microseconds or always round to seconds throughout implementation_plan.json
recommendations.rationale: Mixed precision (some .020525, some .000000) suggests inconsistent timestamp sources; standardization aids auditing
